creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 167452
Update to OpenCL 2.1 API

Since API 2.1 includes CL/cl_egl.h, which contains

#include <EGL/egl.h>

I seems obvious to me that the port devel/opencl depends on library libEGL, which can be found through port

graphics/libEGL

So, an additional LIB_DEPEND has been introduced reflecting this dependency.

Thanks to N. Zeising for considerations.
